description: Ion wasm array-data pointer safepoint bug - MWasmLoadField could keep an ArrayDataPointer live across a GC-triggering helper call without recording it in the safepoint. The vulnerable code generation in js/src/jit/CodeGenerator.cpp let createArrayIL trigger a nursery collection while the array-data pointer was only a raw live register. The GC could move or poison the backing store, then the post-call write barrier reused the stale pointer, producing ASAN use-after-poison/use-after-free. The fix tracks ArrayDataPointer values at safepoints in CodeGenerator.cpp.
